raw_consumer_statement:
Using my BestBuy Credit Card I made a repair appointment with Best Buy at XXXX XX/XX/year>... .I then canceled the appointment 1 hour later on the same day at XXXX XX/XX/year>. 

I have written confirmation of the cancellation from the merchant. 

No service was provided. I received no benefit. 

BestBuy + BestBuy Credit card are not removing the charges of {$52.00} Even if per BestBuy Credit Card 's own letter ( attached ) the charges are supposed to be removed while in dispute ... these charges have yet to be removed from my account. 

BestBuy/BestBuy Credit card seem to be in cahoots and acting as the same entity.
